---
title: "Adventures"
---

Ideas:

<div class="list-group">
  <a href="pottery.qmd" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">Pottery</a>
  <a href="#" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">Swimming/Beach</a>
  <a href="#" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">Dancing</a>
  <a href="#" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">Games</a>
</div>
